mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_trial ( id, course_id, title, quantity, remaining_quantity, lesson_count, expire_days, end_date, state, creator, editor, add_time, edit_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{dto.id}, #{dto.courseId}, #{dto.name}, #{dto.totalIssue}, #{dto.totalIssue}, #{dto.lessonCount}, #{dto.validDays}, #{dto.endDate}, IFNULL(#{dto.isActive}, 1), 1, 1, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
